name: advisor-for-startups
description: Three sibling skills for startups building on AWS: 'knowledge-base-for-startups' (Activate FAQ, credits, programs, partner offers, sample architectures, 277 learn articles), 'prompt-library-for-startups' (30 copy-paste prompts + 4 downloadable installable agents), and 'start-building-for-startups' (interactive discovery workflow that scaffolds an AWS architecture).
